zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford於大約1125年出生在英國英格蘭艾可雷利時，她的父親Henry of Essex7歲，母親Cecely De Valognes5歲。她和Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford至少有1個兒子。她去世於1195年在英國英格蘭艾可享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

nameMeanings.name: Countess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire, of Norman origin): from Middle English contas(e), Old French contesse ‘countess’, applied as a nickname for a proud, haughty woman or for a foppish man, or as an occupational name for a servant of a countess.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Oxford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern and central England): habitational name from the city of Oxford. The placename derives from Old English oxa ‘ox’ + ford ‘ford’. Compare Oxenford .

variants.name: Oxenford
meanings: English: variant of Oxford , derived from an older form of the placename (recorded as Oxnaforda in about 925, named with Old English oxna, genitive plural of oxa ‘ox’).

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford was born about 1125, in Rayleigh, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry of Essex, was 7 and her mother, Cecely De Valognes, was 5. She had at least 1 son with Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford. She died in 1195, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford est née environ 1125, à Rayleigh, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry of Essex, avait 7 ans et sa mère, Cecely De Valognes, avait 5 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford. Elle est décédée en 1195, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Colne Priory, Earls Colne, Essex, Englan: Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford um 1125 in Rayleigh, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry of Essex 7 und ihre Mutter Cecely De Valognes 5. Sie hatte mit Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1195 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxfordが約1125年にイギリスイギリスエセックスレイレイグで生まれた時，父Henry of Essexは7歳，母Cecely De Valognesは5歳であった。彼女はAubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxfordとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1195年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford(이)가 대략 1125년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 라일리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry of Essex(은)는 7세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecely De Valognes(은)는 5세였다. 그녀는 Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford родилась около 1125 г. в местности реилиг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry of Essex было 7 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecely De Valognes, 5. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford. Она умерла в 1195 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
